title: Epigram - Yes, Every Poet Is A Fool
content:
Yes, every poet is a fool;
By demonstration, Ned can show it:
Happy could Ned's inverted rule
Prove every fool to be a poet.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Matthew Prior, titled "Epigram - Yes, Every Poet Is A Fool", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
